hfcd5f519g4184g47d2ga071g5ca3acb7e266: If any of your stuff goes missing, just let me know. You're family now.
hc9fac03eg458ag4c40g922dg87684ef6a46e: Somebody stole the idol. If I find out who it was... I'll recruit 'em.
h04db1abcga8afg4bd7g8f9egd3234ea7905a: You do good work. If you can handle more than goblins, might be I'll have use of you in Baldur's Gate.
hfb5abc6ega060g45a3g88b4g8b6ede8eda5d: Thanks. See you in Baldur's Gate, I hope. Now scram, before I get emotional.
hc7bd7d58g06fcg4668gbec2gda9273910d01: I don't have the idol you were after.
h89d3c42cgb253g431bg82b2g1c81d0489dcb: Damn it. Having that stashed away would have made life a lot easier.
hc6ea67a5gbfc7g4fd1g8febg8be8690458e1: I couldn't get the idol you asked about.
h3ccd56a6g5995g44dbg8de2g1cb09167d797: You're a terrible liar. We had a deal.
h6be14461g1bf4g4fd4ga838g43386d1d6930: Fine. Hope the damn thing's cursed.
hf73616eage1b0g414dgbecag5d6e289cb0f0: Some advice - if you want something, don't ask. Just take.
h2e419a9bg4f46g4258gb15dgd17bdcf856bc: Sounds more like a challenge than advice. Keep an eye on your pack.
haecaf6eeg17ccg4bd0g8c4agf978447e58d8: Yes? I've got places to be - I'm sure you do, too.
h63d39d7cgd598g4f7egb710gf5596fd4a98f: What? I've said thank you. Should I write you a poem, too?
h721abae7gbd0fg498fgbc75gdd9586b6f9ec: You were stupid to come back.
h112f21d8ga998g4a33ga28bga3023746a9a3: Still here? The smart ones ran a long while back.
h4b580a51ga94fg456dgbd63ge8f63b0f4e9d: Come to say your goodbyes before the end comes? Wish I could fight with you.
hcf6b14e0g4268g49e2g8d69gaa1331b5b5e8: Are you any good with those knives? We need every blade.
hda77f186g8fadg4a45g8a45gd7ade4aa34c3: Zaki told me about you, toad-lady. Your kind scared Zorru real bad.
hac123a3cg6baeg42feg8d11gde6c18c95a44: Quiet, hatchling. What are you doing down here?
hbb77361eg675dg42cag9c70g4f0b2a3a7e99: Listening to stories - I think you're a little old for them. Or are you looking for a place to hide when the end comes?
hdae6b5b5g125fg4fd7gbdcdgddeb0660ae98: If ever there was a time to be scared, I'd say this is it.
hf04f6cc5gbfbbg4085ga565gba162ee2c38b: You're a little old for story-time. Looking for a place to hide when the end comes?
h8cf689cdg22b5g49ddgaca3ge850f55086d5: You look a little old for this yourself.
hd53aff94g571bg44b7gbe7cg4703d1cc1640: Take it up with Zevlor. Apparently I'm 'too young' to fight on the wall.
h286ae635g8693g4e93gbecegeba2ffd88ee4: Doesn't matter. The fight will come to us, no matter what he says.
h0a24e35fg5da6g4526g9117gdd6d01cbc2c9: Take it up with Asharak. Apparently I'm 'too young' to fight on the wall.
h3326e559g16a8g4a57g8f38gf666fbe06dd0: The end's not coming today. I promise.
h40965b67g239cg43ccga56cg9753fec92f0e: If you honestly believe that, maybe it's best you hide down here with the other children.
h63430248gf672g4466g8ab4g55db111825bf: You're never too old for stories.
h11ef6717ga432g4f01gb3aag85b7eda6137f: Mirkon keeps telling the other kids they'll all be safe if they stay hidden.
hcc50e4c2g5b89g4392g9919gd48c16a999e2: Just another fairy-tale though, isn' it?
hac05a651g84bfg4449gabbag6af3dc3d3348: The singer keeps telling us that if we're good and quiet, we'll all be safe.
